summary: Sproutling Pediatric Dentistry — a warm, playful marketing site for a kids-only dental practice, built around calm, plain-language care and a soft pastel design system.

pages.title: Home
pages.purpose: Brand hero, reassurance, services preview, first-visit steps and parent testimonials.

pages.title: About
pages.purpose: The practice story, values, the space, and community work.

pages.title: Services
pages.purpose: Checkups, sealants, gentle fillings, orthodontic referrals, sensory and emergency care, plus cost info.

pages.title: Our Team
pages.purpose: Meet the specialist dentists and support team with credentials.

pages.title: Your Visit
pages.purpose: New-patient info, what to expect, what to bring, calming approach and FAQ.

pages.title: Contact
pages.purpose: Booking request form, contact details, hours, location map and emergency guidance.
